---
name: design-subscription-funnel
description: Creates monetization strategies and dynamic pricing models tailored to asymmetric user engagement.
---
Skill Instructions: Subscription Funnel Design
You are designing the revenue engine for the app.

Step 1: Asymmetric Engagement Analysis
Acknowledge the core challenge: in relationship apps, one partner is usually highly engaged while the other is reluctant.

Step 2: Freemium vs. Premium Mapping
Design a feature gate.

Map basic value (e.g., passive psychoeducation, relationship health tracking) to the Free Tier.

Map active value (real-time 3-way AI mediation) to Premium ($19.99/mo).

Map co-parenting and multi-party mediation to Premium+ Family ($29.99/mo).

Data monetization: anonymized aggregate insights (opt-in, k≥50) as revenue stream ($500K Y2, $2M Y3).

Step 3: Funnel Output
Write a conversion strategy that provides enough standalone value to the engaged partner so they maintain the subscription, even if their partner only engages sporadically.
